title: sideritis clandestina var. cyllenea
intro: Sideritis clandestina var. cyllenea, also known as Greek mountain tea, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Sideritis and is native to the mountains of Greece. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sideritis clandestina var. cyllenea include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and neuroprotective effects. Herbal preparations of Sideritis clandestina var. cyllenea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
